response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong polyglot experience (TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, C/C++) and a solid software craftsmanship background including TDD and tooling work. However, the role demands deep JVM expertise with Java, Kotlin, and the Spring ecosystem, plus genuine interest in IDE internals — areas where the resume shows only minimal exposure (Java mentioned briefly for robotic arms and mobile orchestration, a short stint at NI on a C IDE, no Kotlin or Spring at all). The mismatch on core required qualifications is significant.
strengths: Prior IDE contribution experience at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI in C/C++)
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testable design
Broad polyglot experience across complex systems and large-scale codebases
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin experience and only limited Java exposure
No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience listed anywhere on the resume
Recent work centers on TypeScript/Node and DLang, not the JVM ecosystem

key_factors.factor: Minimal Java and no Kotlin experience
